runner_notes: Direct git binding confirms the feature worktree and branch.
Some runner root detection sees the parent checkout because this worktree is nested under .worktrees; use the absolute worktree root for all commands and subagent prompts.

outcomes: JSON schemaVersion 1 with stable top-level fields
MCP expected states return one normal text content payload
unmapped hunks are separate diagnostics, not invented impacts
mode semantics fixed for unstaged, staged, all, and base-ref
base-ref compares HEAD to merge base and ignores dirty local-only changes
git rename detection preserves old and new paths
pure moves suppress phantom semantic impact while edited or deleted indexed symbols still map
binary, generated, unsupported, unindexed, untracked, and stale-index states are explicit diagnostics or warnings
callerDepth clamps to 1-3 and maxCallers clamps to 1-100
hub risk is unique direct upstream caller count greater than 20
failOn grammar is comma-separated callers>N and/or hub
affectedFlows state mirrors SPEC-011 disabled, unavailable, not_indexed, stale, empty, or available states

reviewability.block_threshold_stop: pause if implementation approaches 800 reviewable LOC

resolved_during_checklist: all mode now includes untracked-file diagnostics
unavailable report status and exitCode 3 are specified
flow output cap maxFlows 20 is specified
unmapped diagnostic reason precedence is specified

atomicity_route.releasable: yes after all three user stories plus polish gates complete
warnings: split-PR fallback if implementation approaches 800 reviewable LOC
atomicity-route helper was not present in the checkout

coverage.success_criteria: 8/9 direct, SC-009 partial through local-only constraints and UAT

findings.recommendation: Remove [P] markers or split test files if parallel agents are used

findings.recommendation: Strengthen T045 or add a polish task if implementation reveals network-sensitive code paths

spec, plan, contracts, checklists, and tasks are complete
medium advisories remain visible but do not block implementation
reviewability warning has a two-slice route and 800 LOC stop condition

implementation_summary.mcp: codegraph_detect_changes is exposed on the default MCP surface with success-shaped expected states and bounded output
implementation_summary.tests: unit, CLI, MCP, helper, and fixture coverage added for SPEC-012 behavior
